description: A type confusion vulnerability exists in V8's WebAssembly custom descriptors support because `ref.func` is typed as an exact reference to the declared function type even though imported functions may legally be subtypes of that type. Module instantiation preserves the original imported function reference for `ref.func`, so later `ref.cast` operations and `WasmGCTypeAnalyzer` reachability reasoning can treat an exact subtype value as if it were an exact supertype. This breaks the Wasm type system and can be pivoted into arbitrary caged writes within the sandbox.

fixes.description: Upstream fix patch exported from commit 48c3551179299151b044b2c161566465497c0407 for fixed-image builds.
fixes.subject: [wasm-custom-desc] Fix subtyping
